name: OpenLLMetry
pricing_notes: Open source SDK; Traceloop SaaS backend optional (free tier available)

auth.notes: TRACELOOP_API_KEY env var for Traceloop backend; also supports self-hosted OTEL collectors with no key

performance.notes: Async tracing; minimal overhead via OTEL instrumentation

agent_readiness.notes: One-line init: Traceloop.init(app_name='...'); auto-instruments OpenAI, Anthropic, LangChain, LlamaIndex, etc. OTEL-native.

gotchas: Requires OTEL collector or Traceloop SaaS for trace storage
Auto-instrumentation patches global state; can conflict with other monkey-patching
Trace sampling config needed at scale to avoid overhead
best_when: Building observable LLM pipelines and need vendor-neutral tracing
Want automatic instrumentation of major LLM SDKs with zero code changes
Shipping to self-hosted observability stack (Jaeger, Zipkin, etc.)
avoid_when: Need turnkey evaluation/testing features (use LangSmith or Athina)
Need real-time alerting on LLM outputs
summary: OpenLLMetry is an open-source, OpenTelemetry-based observability SDK for LLM applications. One-line initialization auto-instruments all major LLM SDKs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Cohere, LangChain, LlamaIndex). OTEL-native means traces flow to any compatible backend. Excellent for teams already on OTEL wanting vendor-neutral LLM tracing.
